title: pongamia pinnata var. pinnata
intro: Pongamia pinnata var. pinnata, also known as the Indian beech or karanja, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pongamia pinnata var. pinnata include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, as well as its use in managing diabetes and reducing cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of this plant include extracts, oils, and infusions, which can be used in traditional medicine or as natural remedies for various health issues.
